name: access508
description: Accessible (WCAG 2.2 AA) ADA / Section 508 educational web app with an embedded transcript-first voice assistant.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace server & npm run dev --workspace web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace web && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace web
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test --workspace web --if-present && npm run test --workspace server --if-present
